channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Nicaragua’s president says Trump ‘mentally deranged’ over war on Iran
item.description: Nicaraguan President has criticised his US counterpart Donald Trump, over the war on Iran.

item.title: US forces detain Iran-linked tanker Tifani with ceasefire talks on edge
item.description: Ship, detained under US policy to stop all Tehran-linked vessels, is under sanctions for smuggling Iranian crude.

item.title: Trump says he opposes extending Iran ceasefire amid talks uncertainty
item.description: US president says Iran has 'no choice' but to show up to the negotiations in Pakistan and accept a 'great' deal.

item.title: Iran’s World Cup participation depends on team’s safety in the US: Minister
item.description: Iran's team is preparing for the FIFA World Cup but may not travel to the tournament, Sport Minister Donyamali says.

item.title: Israeli soldiers and settlers kill 11 Palestinians across Gaza, West Bank
item.description: In Hebron, a 16-year-old is struck by a vehicle escorting an Israeli minister and killed.

item.title: Pakistan races against time to get Iran back to US talks as truce end nears
item.description: But a series of escalations by the US is complicating those efforts, say analysts.

item.title: Iran-US war: Four scenarios for what’s next as talks stumble
item.description: Between an expiring ceasefire and a possible deal lies a range of ways in which the war could proceed, analysts say.

item.title: What was the Iran nuclear deal Trump dumped in search of ‘better’ terms?
item.description: Trump withdrew the US from the JCPOA in 2018, branding it 'the worst deal ever' and seeking stronger terms.

item.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
item.description: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.

item.title: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
item.description: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.
